name: la01
instruction: Optimize schedule for 10 Jobs (denoted as J) across 5 Machines (denoted as M) to minimize makespan. The makespan is the completion time of the last operation in the schedule. Each M can process only one J at a time, and once started, J cannot be interrupted.
